properties.displayName: Audit storage account allow Azure services.
properties.description: Ensure 'Allow Azure services on the trusted services list to access this storage account' is Enabled for Storage Account Access
nonComplianceMessages: Azure services must be allowed on the trusted services list to access this storage account. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
